narrative:
St Clair Township has 4,101 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
